title: Institution Timeline
description: Year-over-year institution participation in artifact evaluation, broken down by area. Shows which institutions contributed AE committee members each year and tracks unique institution counts over time.

all.description: Per-year institution participation counts across all areas. Keyed by year string; values are objects mapping institution name to member count.

systems.description: Per-year institution participation counts for systems conferences.

security.description: Per-year institution participation counts for security conferences.

top_by_year.description: Top institutions per year, ranked by participation count.

unique_by_year.description: Count of unique institutions participating each year, split by area.

TopByYearEntry.description: Top institutions for a single year.

institutions.description: Institutions ranked by AE member count for this year.

TopByYearEntry.title: TopByYearEntry

InstitutionCount.description: An institution and its member count.

count.description: Number of AE committee members from this institution.

InstitutionCount.title: InstitutionCount

UniqueByYearEntry.description: Unique institution count for a single year.

total.description: Total unique institutions across all areas.

UniqueByYearEntry.title: UniqueByYearEntry
